projects.title: Quantum Shield AntiVirus
projects.description: Android antivirus application focused on malware detection using hash-based scanning techniques. The app compares file signatures against known malicious hashes to identify threats and provides basic device protection features.

projects.title: Calosync Health
projects.description: Cross-platform calorie and health tracking application designed to help users lose or gain weight. Features include calorie logging, recipe tracking, progress monitoring, and AI-powered tools such as a chatbot assistant for guidance and food logging.

projects.title: Children's Story Books
projects.description: Interactive children’s book application that allows young users to read digital storybooks, color characters, and engage with creative learning activities designed for early childhood development.

projects.title: Coin Kids Finance
projects.description: Flutter-based financial literacy app for kids, available on both Android and iOS. The app helps children save money toward goals, bookmark desired products using Amazon APIs, and track progress in a fun and educational way.

projects.title: Recover Master
projects.description: Android data recovery application designed to restore lost files such as photos, videos, and documents from Android devices by scanning storage and identifying recoverable data.

projects.title: Video Downloader
projects.description: Lightweight and easy-to-use video downloader that enables users to quickly download media content with a simple interface and fast processing.

projects.title: Face Animate AI
projects.description: Creative entertainment app that animates static images by applying facial motion and dance animations synchronized with music, allowing users to create fun and expressive animated content.

projects.title: Anti Theft
projects.description: Android productivity application that helps users stay focused by blocking distractions and tracking app usage to promote better digital wellbeing and time management.

projects.title: Privify VPN
projects.description: Secure file vault application that allows users to protect sensitive files, photos, and documents using strong encryption and authentication mechanisms.

projects.title: Privify VPN Lite
projects.description: Cross-platform VPN application for Android and iOS built using OpenVPN, focusing on secure and private internet access. Backend infrastructure was managed using DevOps practices for scalability and reliability.

projects.title: Screen Cast
projects.description: Powerful screen casting application for Android that enables users to stream and cast their device screen to various devices such as TVs, web browsers, and media players seamlessly.

projects.title: Time Warp
projects.description: Advanced image and video editing application featuring creative tools such as time warp effects, face swapping, background replacement, and sky replacement for visually engaging content creation.
